Contact

Get in Touch

We are here to help you with any inquiry. Call us or visit us. If you have any questions or would like to get in touch, please feel free to contact us at admin@roofingdepot.com.au or fill out the form below and we will get back to you as soon as possible.

Have questions? Well, we have all the answers

01. Require Delivery?

+

Delivery is subject to availability. Give us a call after you place your online flashing order for a delivery price. Delivery is only available local to Coombabah.

02. Expected Turnaround?

+

Roofing Depot always endeavours to provide quick turnaround on all flashing orders, however, depending on the complexity, number of orders to process and factory workflow, the turnaround may be an extra day or so.

03. Flexible Payment?

+

Flexible payment options allow customers to choose from a variety of payment methods, including credit cards, debit cards, online payment services, and even cash. Payment is required prior to production for Flashing orders.

04. How can I place an order?

+

Placing an order is quick and easy. Simply browse our online store, select the products you desire, and add them to your cart. Proceed to the checkout process, where you’ll provide your shipping and payment details. Once your order is confirmed, we’ll take care of the rest.

05. What payment methods do you accept??

+

We accept various payment methods, including major credit cards (Visa, Mastercard, American Express), PayPal, and other secure online payment platforms. Rest assured that your payment information is protected and encrypted for a secure transaction.

Flexible Payment? + Flexible payment options allow customers to choose from a variety of payment methods, including credit cards, debit cards, online payment services, and even cash. Payment is required prior to production for Flashing orders. ### 04\. How can I place an order? + Placing an order is quick and easy. Simply browse our online store, select the products you desire, and add them to your cart. Proceed to the checkout process, where you’ll provide your shipping and payment details. Once your order is confirmed, we’ll take care of the rest. ### 05\.
